center.name: 卡尔塔拉火山
center.summary: 卡尔塔拉火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Humblot's flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Humblot's flycatcher is endemic to the island of Grand Comoro in the Comoros where it inhabits forest on the slopes of Mount Karthala. The scientific name commemorates the French naturalist Léon Humblot

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Humblot's flycatcher is endemic to the island of Grand Comoro in the Comoros where it inhabits forest on the slopes of Mount Karthala. The scientific name commemorates the French naturalist Léon Humblot
